channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 188 replies — 462.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 188 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:22 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62032694
>>62032418
Another trap of the mind is that you have control. Just you thinking "I have control over the mind" is one level 1. Level 2 is "My mind has control over me". Just you noticing that you are NOT in control is moving further, not backwards. Took me literally years to realize that I don't control it, it controls me. The biggest lie the devil has ever sold is that it doesn't exist. The biggest lie the mind has ever sold is that YOU'RE in control. If you believe that then think again and while you think about it just OBSERVE your mind. Just look at what your mind is telling you. How it'll try to convince you "No anon, you're the one in control. You're the master". Watch out, the mind is tricky tricky. It'll play all sorts of tricks and you'll always be convinced that it's not. The mind always wants to keep on minding, that's what it wants. You becoming silent is what kills it and it does not want that. And that's why everyone is asleep and has a hard time waking up. Because their mind wants to keep on minding and not be woken up. Because waking up means the mind dies.

62032922
100$ end of bull run. Gavin is the biggest Web3 pedo grooming gang leader in the industry. He's the connecting point for everyone else. Why do you think that DOT has native interoperability? It's because his nickname in the cheese pizza community is "The connector". He kidnaps desperate little girls, 17 and under, from Ukraine and sells them into decentralized slavery. Let's just say that everyone in the industry shares them. It's a decentralized industry after all. Epstein island looks like a paradise compared to the Web3 pedo conventions Gavin has been organizing. Imagine 9 inch BBC destroying 12yo Ukrainian cheese pizza while Gavin is watching and eating Jerky (I hope you guys know what Jerky stands for). It's all according to plan. DOT is actually THE coin for cheese pizza. It is a vital part in buying and selling of cheese pizza and jerky. It is the central focal point of the grooming rape gang that Gavin is spearheading. We are the ultimate elite underground society. We control even the jews, for the jews buy cheese pizza and jerky from us and Gavin has a whole collection of pictures and video evidence of the cheese pizza / jerky parties. At any moment he will use all of this evidence and blackmail Israel and the jews into buying DOT therefore catapulting it to 100$+. We're going to make is soo hard. Gavin is our leader and he'll make sure our poor Indian villages are all feed.

May Vishnu of the Pedochain be with you

Best regards
Rajakish Punjabi Kumar

62032929
>>62032462
>>62032477
>>62032667
>>62032676
>>62032694

All well and good. Themind can be a hindrance and be your most powerful ally,however you are missing a key element here. Its what you learn,consume, previous post about social media and letting others influence you. The mind doesn't need to be the enemy. Its what you put into it, who you associate with. Its always in development or.....destruction

62032935
>>62032922
You are one wild dude

62032967
>>62032929
>The mind doesn't need to be the enemy
I never said it is. If the mind is your enemy then it'll fight against you. You'll never win the fight against your own mind. What you repress will grow stronger. My whole point is to observe it in a non-judgmental way. If you do that it'll start to collapse in on itself. Just by observing your mind, just by noticing it's movement it'll start to stop moving. If you're fighting it then you're interacting it. If you interact you feed the movement. Ok, let's try and experiment. Sit on your chair, start watching your mind and when a thought comes up start to FIGHT IT AS HARD AS YOU CAN. Go full force at it, try to silence is as best as you can. Do that for like 15min and your head will start to hurt and the thought will keep coming back louder and louder. Don't believe me? Good, try it yourself. Don't believe anything but the experience itself.
The nature of the mind is so that it can only do multiplications and additions. You can't substract and divide. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. Let me guess? You're thinking about a monkey breathing fire, right? Funny how that works, right? You'd never thought about it if I didn't point it out, right?

>Themind can be a hindrance and be your most powerful ally
That's a though produced by your mind. It tries to make you believe it's your ally in order to keep on minding. It's neither your ally or your enemy. It just doesn't want to die and therefore it'll trick you into believing all sorts of things. Ask yourself this "Is my mind tricking me?" and then OBSERVE your mind and see what it does and how it tries to trick you. Just try. I'm not saying I'm right or wrong. Get the experience yourself.

62032974
>>62032929
>>62032967
>If you do that it'll start to collapse in on itself
This takes time and consistent effort. It doesn't JUST happen... And I'm not saying to believe my bullshit. You try it yourself and then you come to your own conclusions. DYOR. See what happens. Weird shit is going to start happening.

62032992
>>62032922
>imagine my fetish
no thanks

62033000
>>62032992
Fetish? We're talking about a pizza party with some side dish of freshly harvested young jerky.

62033138
wtf is this trash thread, it reads like a random schizos blog

62034039
>>62033138
Must be true if you say so

62034101
>>62033138
Or wait. Let's try this. Might be an interesting conversation. How so? What have I done or said to make you believe that?

62034381
7,5$ top in 2028
+400% from ATL

62034423
>>62032967
This exercise is very elementary.

>And not saying to believe my Bullshit
Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?

62034490
>>62034423
>Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?
How so? What makes you think that?

62034856
>>62034423
>This exercise is very elementary.
So, what you're saying is that it's easy to do and therefore it's appropriate? And that it gets the point across and makes the person doing the experiment have the necessary experience in order to become aware of how the mind works? That's great!

62034890
>>62034490
Reread your posts
>>62034856
Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess

62034963
>>62034890
Right... So your point is?

62035196
>>62034381
grim

62035839
>>62034963
I didn't have one

62036344
>>62035839
Ok. So, ... You wanna talk about anything? Anything on your mind?

You said
>Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess
What would you like to know about the mind, if anything? If you don't think the exercise is appropriate then it's because you already understand, right? And if you tell me what you don't understand then we can start moving in that direction, right? Or don't tell me. It's up to you

62037187
>>62034101
>178 replies
>105 pbtid

oh I dunno

62037296
>>62037187
Gavin is paying me to keep the thread alive. This is how we live in Mumbai my good sir. We shill coins while talking about the mind.

62037323
>>62037187
I need rupees to worship the Vishnu on the blockchain my good sar. And to feed my village of Mumbai, the city of DOT.

62037509
>>62037296
>>62037323

Post hand

62039073
>>62037509
I already did here >>62008295. True Mumbai warrior hand. My fathers name was Kumar, my mothers name was Lakshmi. Pic related. I'm the little prince

62039085
>>62037509
I am now a Vishnu warrior of the blockchain, living in the city of DOT, Mumbai. I run a scam call center, they call me papa Rupee over here. I make many Rupees for many villages. We feed whole of city of DOT, Mumbai. We eat very good. Our bellies are very full.

62040207
>>62039073
>>62039085

Shitposting or on hard drugs constantly?

62040932
>>62040207
I don't get the question? Help me understand what you mean. And thanks for bumping the thread. Gavin Wood, our lord and saviour, will be very pleased with you.

May the blockchain Vishnu be with you good sar

62041893
>>62040932
Read again slowly

62042472
>>62041893
Yea..... You're asking me if I'm shitposting or on hard drugs constantly? That's your question? I can't decipher your half-formed sentences to be honest.

item.title: ½ Trillion Gone — 60 replies — 240.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
½ Trillion Gone

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:33 UTC

OP

The US stock market wiped out $500 Billion dollars today. You did sell all your goyboxes, didn't you anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62036869
Haha, just kidding. It was actually a $1 Trillion dollars.

62036893
i bought the dip
panicans lose
TTP

62036894
unless you're a day trader none of this matters and even if you're a day trader still none of this matters you will lose your money regardless. fud doesn't work on proper investment strategies. longing the market won game over bye bye pink wojaks farming crypto queer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62037131
>>62036893
Betting that a war 30+ years in the planning is going to stop halfway, from a nation who sees it as an existential problem that can only be solved now is pretty dumb.

62037151
Already swapped to bonds as soon as the inside nibbas exited back in october.

62037154
>>62036906
Kamala isn’t going to have sex with you, incel.

62037293
>>62036969
unfortunately, there are some dumps on that graph which you really don't want to fall into unless you were only planning to hand your portfolio over to your children anyway

62037311
>>62036893
Israel and Iran have their own opinions on if the war can continue.
Trump can't cuck out without their assent.

62037318
>>62036969
>1980 to 2000 was peak human civilization
Yeah I'd believe it

62037324
>>62036969
That's good news for the immortal among us here.

62037377
>>62036853
>price goes down $0.01
>SEVENTY HUNDRED BAZILLION DOLALRY DOOS WAS DELOOTED FROM DA MARKAT!
the stupidity is oh so tiresome.

62037382
>>62037377
it's the same people who want to tax unrealized gains

62037404
>>62036908
Lucky you.

62037409
>>62036935
Damn gold still up 2% ytd. I should buy more of it but I've become completely detached from all my holds.

62037465
>>62037377
It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective when your government's military and entitlement spending are 104% of receipts and $40 trillion in debt. Perhaps it is that equity movement is just noise but if the bond market breaks this little hiccup will be seen as an appetizer to the screaming. From a political perspective someone who makes the markets being strong his only feature and continues to destabilize them through retarded decisions is similarly concerning but it will cull the weak and a lot of entities caught in the crossfire. Indians are sliming each other out over gas right now, you don't realize how bad it's going to get. Even if we stopped today it could be too late. Democrats are salivating as if their ascension could do anything to alleviate the horrors. Mo money fo dem programs does not a balanced budget make. If one is secure in his employment he could do quite well but that's predicated upon all the ones that aren't getting fucked and consumed by the dying empire. It'll be hell but finally the bottom can fall out, the useless and unlucky cast aside, chuds will reign just by having access to food and shelter. The idea of 100k 1/4 ton trucks dies since no ones wages are meaningfully going up. The management class and bean counters get decimated. Today is not nothing, as a single event it would be negligible but as a part of the larger picture it's the embodiment of everything getting worse following blind optimism.

62037470
>>62037465
Americans have infinite money

62037482
>minis 1%
can't even care, wake me up with a real crash of 12-15+%

62037501
perhaps today was not the best day to try to get into trading methinks

62037510
You can always tell the /pol/faggots apart because they think that even the worst market downturn in history is some kind of spiral that will never end. They're unironically the same kind of faggots that get hyped up when a hurricane comes in and keep spamming about it when it's already gone hoping the death toll will rise. Total fucking losers lol

62037531
Whoever made this trade is probably dead now with a bullet in the head.

62037566
>>62036853
>DJIA dropped 1%
>S&P 500 dropped 1.7%
>Nasdaq-100 dropped 2.4%
OMG it's a fucking nothingburger! However can the West survive an event of this insignificance!

62037573
>>62037465
>It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective
Only if you're Dutch. Americans don't have a tax on unrealized capital gains.

62037605
>>62037510
Japanese women are so pleased with themselves!
They saved the japanese stock market with their female japanese asian women tendencies and birthrates and JAV appearances.
The yen was saved.
The japanese race is saved!

62037625
>>62037470
Its actually kind of crazy how many people don't realize this and keep acting like we should try to bring our wars in under budget. The money is infinite. It always has been infinite, it always will be infinite. There is enough money to drop a six million dollar missile on top of every individual brown person on the planet, it makes absolutely no difference.

62037699
>>62036969
Even though that chart is calculated “without inflation” it’s still affected by it.
In that there’s still a gravitational pull from scared fiat looking to park itself. So participation still increases in absolute terms.

62037786
>>62036853
I voted for this

62037819
>>62037501
It’s unironically a great day. Investing is the opposite of traffic lights. Buy red. Hold green. Sell calls and puts for premiums when it crabs. It’s really that simple. Theres going to be a lot of money made on shipping, weapons, and oil for anyone with a brain. If the market trends down invest in coffee. Its a really undersold defensive because white bitches no matter how broke will never give up their Starslops.

62038287
>>62037625
Your fucking retarded, America has crumbling infrastructure, no real manufacturing base, gutted educational standards, no major sources of economic growth accounting for inflation and a decimated middle.

The 8+ trillion plus dollars and other resources we spent on the middle east forever wars, could have easily propelled America into a global economic behemoth that dwarfs China and the rest of planet if it was well invested.

62038473
>>62036908
LMAO

62038644
>>62038287
But muh national security

62038720
>>62037293
we are also living in an era where anyone with a smartphone can be there own broker. kids growing up today are investing into markets which will keep the trend line up more than ever before. compound these facts with rampant consumerism. it's not a good time to be a bear generally speaking

62042487
>>62037625
Do you perhaps work for the Treasury Dept under the Trump administration?
You sound just retarded enough.

62042521
>>62036853
Insanely bullish for gold.

item.title: What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generat… — 31 replies — 101.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generat…

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:28 UTC

OP

What's going to replace the US dollar? I don't think we'll get the PetroYuan at least any time soon even in this generation, it's more likely we'll be going back to Gold and Silver standards as the entire economy sharts itself.

Early replies (first 3)

62039586
>>62039580
Didn't they say in Agenda 2030 or the Great Reset or something that we're switching to Central Bank Digital Currency?

62039592
>>62039580
dogecoin clearly

62039597
>>62039580
CBDCs
This is obviously controlled demolition, US empire is on exit door for long time now. CBDCs, IDs to verify identity using any and all OS, constant CCTV monitoring.... we are going to a cyberpunk dystopia but without cool augments
That's why Elon and Trump had love hate relationship, because it was about this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62039605
>>62039580
Rubels

62039677
>>62039580
The USD chart looks bullish to me actually, honestly the whole Iran situation is big bullish for the dollar imo, it's completel.y fucking voer the energy markets in Americas largest competitors, Asia and Europe, meanwhile the US has just started receiving large amounts of oil from Venezuela and is already energy independent.

62039886
>>62039580
Ether

62039911
I don't know how anyone can still have faith in this shit
https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0425

62039988
>>62039580
There's not enough gold and silver in the world to replace the dollar. Physical metals just don't work at the scale and speed that the world needs.
I do feel like there has to be something, some invention, that could solve the medium of exchange issue for world trade so that countries don't have to rely on a single nation's economy and its currency to be able to trade with each other. Some economist will invent it at some point in the future and everybody will be like how didn't we think of this earlier.

62040044
>>62039988
>There's not enough gold and silver in the world to replace the dollar

This never made sense to me, if there's not enough then you just make it really expensive and divide it into smaller amounts like with BTC right?

62040053
>>62039677
>muh lines on a chart
you're no better than astrologist

62040079
>>62040044
I think you want to be able to produce new currency when it's needed, otherwise, there won't be enough money in the system to go around and economic growth slows. If this sounds hand-wavy, it's because I don't understand it properly myself. Also, you can't instantly wire 5 tons of gold between banks like you can with currency. You have to fly it to the destination bank, which takes time, money, and exposes the gold to theft, which means you have to hire heavy security, which increases cost.

62040283
>>62039597
> IDs to verify identity using any and all OS, constant CCTV monitoring
... Palantir...

62040299
>>62039988

XRP

62040300
>>62039580
No single reserve currency but rather you can trade in multiple currencies like the USD, Euro, Yen, etc

62040467
>>62039592
>>62039886
>>62040299

no.

The correct answer is Bitcoin. Everything else is wrong.

62040476
>>62040299
>>62040467
Nobody cares about your shitty little ponzi coins.

62040499
>>62039586
This literally wouldn't work because of shit like conflict minerals and general 3rd world. How are the Africans mining coltan in the middle of an ethnic genocide for Semiconductor Inc. going to get paid in Dem.Congo with digital stuff.

62040502
>>62040499
Tatted white women?

62040556
>>62040476

Uniformed commentary is for people who enjoy poverty.

62040562
>>62039580
Goypoints.

62040600
>>62040556
Bro, even if the central banks wanted to use crypto, they'd just pick one and clone it. They're not going to pay you anything for your imaginary internet funny money.

62040622
>>62040600

> central banks

How's the weather in Tel Aviv, rabbi?

62040632
>>62039580
>What's going to replace the US dollar?

Nothing, everyone else is in a worse off state than the US with massive demographic bubbles and they're inflating their way out.

62040653
>>62039580
>it's more likely we'll be going back to Gold and Silver standards
this is baggie cope
pms are just another asset to be pumped and dumped, nothing more

62040674
>>62039580
Government backed stablecoins
Have you not been following the news over the past couple years? Every major economic market is trying to kill money and circumvent banking to achieve total control.

62040684
>>62039677
The usd value is the result of a trust engine. The moment the qorld stops trusting it as a reserve and/or trade currency, it will become argentinian peso-tier. They are going to have a worse currency devaluation spiral than the late roman empire.

62040693
>>62039592
The only correct answer.

62041375
>>62039988
They already did invent it and it's been running continuously for over 17 years.

62041515
>>62039597
All political parties, feds and billionaires who collude with feds along w big tech want to do this and we’re all moving towards this so they can disenfranchise people with stasi shit without even firing a shot.

62042255
>>62039597
>US empire
Here's that meme again. There is no such thing. You fell for the neocon rhetoric + Hollywood theatrics but can't let go.

62042497
>>62039580
Gold and silver are not feasible as a form of currency in a world of 9-10b people.
It's almost certainly going to be some form of digital currency, likely in the form of CBDC's.

item.title: >stocks down >Gold down >Silver down >Index funds down >BTC down What the hell are we supposed to do? — 25 replies — 63.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
>stocks down >Gold down >Silver down >Index funds down >BTC down What the hell are we supposed to do?

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:22 UTC

OP

>stocks down
>Gold down
>Silver down
>Index funds down
>BTC down
What the hell are we supposed to do? Accumulate cash and eat 14% inflation?

Early replies (first 3)

62040441
>>62040435
>he didn’t buy land

62040443
Stock food and fuel

62040448
>>62040435
>What the hell are we supposed to do >Accumulate cash and eat 14% inflation?
Yes. Then you time the bottom. Probably around September.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62040451
>>62040435
Things that have value, now stop buying from the top and actually do something with your life lol

62040452
buy low

62040457
>>62040441
People are dying nigger it's going down too

62040526
>>62040435
>14% inflation
The latest CPI was 2.4%, stop being overdramatic. Also you can just buy safe bonds if you really want to derisk, those still pay above inflation.

62040559
>>62040526
>The latest CPI was 2.4%, stop being overdramatic.
Yes as long as you don't eat, ever require medical care, or use electricity, sure it's 2.4%

62040565
>>62040435
Soul/soulless

62040566
>>62040559
The total for energy was 0.5% you nigger. And who cares about medical care costs, if you're not a retard you'll have insurance that covers it.

62040992
>>62040435
I voted for this

62040996
>>62040435
yes? stacking cash is not necessarily a bad thing
warren buffet is all cash right now dude

62041004
>>62040526
>believing the 2.4% number

>>62040566
calling others retarded

62041043
>>62040526

CPI will be 5% next report and 7% the report after

62041049
>>62041043
k mr. buffet. if you are so certain about inflation hitting record numbers why dont you just short inflation? how about that?

62041260
>>62040566
>Calls others retard
>Insurance just means you don't pay medical bills

62041314
>>62040435
travel the world, buy your favourite car, live your life
meme numbers on the internet don't matter

62041317
>>62041260
That's literally what insurance does you retard. You pay premiums so that when you need it the insurance company covers your bills.

62041445
>>62041004
>I'm le uber smart conspiracy theorist

62041554
Convert to Judaism

Seriously though, oil stocks were the cheapest sector of the S&P at the start of the year, so even a retard like myself was in them before the war.

62041563
>>62040435

XOM

62042054
>>62041317
>t. a zoomer who has never had his own health insurance

62042070
>>62040435
>Oh no I would sure hate to buy at these cheap prices!
>I only buy at premium prices!

Buy you fucking idiot

62042442
>>62040526
Hahahha hahah hahahah

62042475
>>62040435
im starting a reverse mortgage business where i give 1% off to boomers if they let me kill their lawn before they move out

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62042351

62042428
>>62042351

62042437
need a new hat boys

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62042473
>>62042351

62042485
>>62042351
just long oil, short everytthing else, and take out massive loans at low interest before rates spike

item.title: Post yfw TSLA goes under $300 — 10 replies — 21.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post yfw TSLA goes under $300

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:18 UTC

OP

Post yfw TSLA goes under $300

Early replies (first 3)

62040334
>>62040278
I'll slurp so much it will turn me on

62040398
>>62040278

62040438
>>62040334
Even at $200 it would be disgustingly overvalued
It's a car company and it's worth more than the next 20 biggest car companies put together and it doesn't even sell 10% of the cars.
Yes they make self driving software, and it's pretty good. You know who else does that? Every other fucking car company.
Tesla's self driving software definitely commands a slight premium over a comparable car company who sells 2,000,000 cars a year, but the premium it has is the most astronomically retarded valuation of any publicly traded company I've seen in my life. They do not and never will have a monopoly on self driving or electric cars. Those are incredibly competitive sectors in which Tesla has no greater advantage than a company like McDonald's has over Burger King or Wendy's
The valuation was based on the assumption that they'd be selling 20,000,000 cars a year someday, that number has been declining every year since 2023 and now they're discontinuing models rather than adding them.
Where on Earth is the value in this company beyond science fiction hopes and dreams of a magical fairy tale ending? What value and what expectations are being expected to justify buying Tesla at over $100 a share?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62040760
>>62040438
>car company
C'mon, don't play stupid.

62040824
>>62040438
Nice reddit post anon, didn't read

62040869
>>62040278
rolf at the tsla faggots telling me its P/E ought to be >400

62040885
>>62040760
How does it make money

62041752
>>62040278
Is this real? Do cat penises look like that?

62042422
>>62041752
if they're black they're much bigger

62042456
The dump for this stock is probably just in the beginning phase

item.title: AT THIS POINT WE ARE CHEERLEADERS, NOT INVESTORS — 8 replies — 19.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
AT THIS POINT WE ARE CHEERLEADERS, NOT INVESTORS

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-27 21:21 UTC

OP

EVERYONE, everyone got rugged. Some are just in more denial than others

>bitchildren
>dwarves
>boomer stocks
>ETF dummies
>fucking tcg collectors
>GMrEdditors

Everyone is losing money. Everyone. Everyone got rugged. There is no fucking reserve of value, everything is going down. Only insiders can make money in this market anymore. It is fucking over, and every other player is an insider because everyone else is broke. While you are dealing in the real world, they are blowing coke off children.

I am completely blackpilled. I have given up. I am tired of being scammed and buying high and selling low. I am liquidating and losing money in treasury bonds, because at least that can't be rugged.

Screw you all.

Early replies (first 3)

62042210
well yes but if everyone gets poorer faster than me, im winning.

62042235
>at this point

62042273
>>62042183
i still in the green YTD thanks to CAT and VLO

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62042425
>>62042273
I call bullshit.

Print portfolio

>>62042210
This board used to be about making money. I refuse to believe anyone made a single cent here after 2024

62042432
>>62042183
>dwarves
Lol im using this

62042444
>>62042425
>print portfolio
Not him but I’m doing pretty well ytd. Lost some money panic selling mining and oil tanker stocks on bad days but overall I’ve been to take out like 30 grand since January. Got a little greedy at some points for sure but still doing very well all things considered. Just riding gas stocks for now, since oil is being manipulated too much on its own. I’m just riding trend lines.

62042460
>>62042183
thanks for playing buddy
someones gotta be there to make my burgers
lets get that shareholder value poompin

62042468
I'm doing quite well with my shiny rocks actually

62038350

62038355
>>62038346

62038453
>>62038225
MOOOOOOOODDDDDDSSSSSSSS

62038593

BTC just does what NQ does now. If you think stocks are going to crab then so will buttcoin.

62038703
>>62038339
you're a fagboat dude let it go you lose

62038721
Dude are getting plenty of attentions frok post wall foids.

62039026
>>62038274
getting angry at it just increases its power

62039043
>>62038225
posting minors on 4chan now? you should feel ashamed

62039121
>>62038225
this boy looks so young, are you sure you can post him on this site?

62039156
>>62038225
>Your best bet this year is BTC. Prove me wrong
There are a bunch of better plays that will pump harder next year.

62039163
>>62038333
The amount of seething from zoomers is unbelievable, I live near a college campus and regularly see bald or wrinkled people walking around in clothes for teens and it takes me a second to figure out that they're not 50yos trying to relive their youth, but incredibly aged and fucked up looking 18yos.

62039725
>>62038355
That dude has horrible genetics and looks his age. I actually love cocky zoomers like you, specially the ones that are already showing signs of baldness and nasolabia wrinkles in their early to mid 20s. My father is pushing 70 and looks like hes in his late 40s so i know how i will age over time. Sorry you didnt win the genetic lottery, keep on malding zoom zoom.

62039736
>>62039163
Yeah i think they are traumatized with how badly they are aging nowadays. Some zoomers in their early 20s look like they are in their 30s. I would also be coping like these retards if i was in the same boat ngl must be brutal
>Eheh at least age number says im young!
Yeah cope harder zoomtards lmao

62039737
>>62039725
Is that all it is? My Dad looks great too but he still gets up at 3:39 to go to the gym in the morning. He's almost 70.

I feel part of me retaining my looks is all the exercise and healthy eating he made me do that zooms def aren't getting.

62039764
>>62038593
You don't really lose money if the cash is worth more when you sell. But you lose money from inflation with the cash in the bank. This is how I see the PM investments. Keep some money in a bank account for emergencies and deflation. PMs for inflation and rare gold bull runs every few decades.

62039767
>>62039737
Its not all. The most important factors are genetics, stress level, sleep quality, diet and sunlight exposure. Intense exercise ages you, you should do moderate exercise only. The people that lived the longest did moderate exercise daily throughtout their entire life (daily tasks stuff that make your body move and be active)

62039774
Another nice ultrasonography, can't wait for him to be born

62040216
>>62038274
you will never age gracefully with that attitude

62040227
>>62038274
>seething at his looks

62040284
>>62038333
That's why it is memed. It was necessary.

62040416
>>62038225
I don't take investment advice from 17 yr old boys anon. Go frolic outside kiddo, leave the market to us grownups.

62040501
>>62038274

62040509
>>62038333

Im 31 and I just had someone tell me I look 23

62040512
>>62038225

62040544

62042262
>>62040509
im 40 and a girl said i look 24, we are all gonna make it

62042471

62039162

62039175
>>62039162

62039176

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62039288
>>62039283
I mined it since the aug of 2016, i ll dca if we ever get sub 1500, do yout fucking thing nigger cz!

62039293
>>62039223
Prepare your stoploss when shorting m8

>>62039232
Yes, we will definitely touch below 1500. But its a matter of "when"

>>62039279
>>62039285
Personally ill DCA BTC at range 48K to 38K. As for ETH i dont know if i will stack there too

62039360
>>62039143
>black swan event
>nothing happens
>-4%
Everyone is just so bored around here and it shows

62039941
>>62039360
We've been crabdumping on everything that isn't the ai ouroboros for so many years a black swan and golden bull might be the same thing lol

62040054
>>62039143
Can anyone explain to me why you would buy bitcoin? its like, not even real.

62040074
>>62039360
>Mr. Mumu, another bear has hit the bitcoin

62040114
>>62040054
Can't you use it to buy coffee in El Salvador or something?

62040220
>>62040054
>>62040114
I used BTC all the time when it was >100k with apps like oobit. My entire last year Thailand trip was paid with BTC.
>But muh taxes
I'm not American. Our IRS equivalent is living in the stone age.

62040521
Here you go retards:

The recent drop to $65,000–$66,000 is being attributed to rising 10-year Treasury yields (hitting a 1-year high of 4.5%) and intensified retail selling.

62040545
>>62040054
If you were in Dubai trying to flee the war, would you rather have your wealth in a crypto wallet or in bricks of gold stored in some local banks vault? Only poors don't understand the use case of something that lets you move wealth around the globe with 0 friction

62040700
>>62040545
bitcoin ledgers are public so have fun making yourself a drone strike target.

what you are actually looking for is XRP.

62040745
>>62040545
>bricks of gold stored in some local jews vault
I have gold and I would never store it like this

62040818
>>62040745
im sure its safer in your stick house
when the shit really hits the fan, no one will trade your shiny rock for cans of food. assuming it doesnt get stolen by armed joggers first.

62040830
>>62040700
it has to keep its value to be a store of value

62040895
>>62040521
I thought it was Marathon dumping everything they had to desperately pay off debt?

62041034
>>62040830
bitcoin is doing almost as bad in the same time frame...
and infinitely worse if you zoom out up to like 5 years...
besides your use case wasn't about store of value it was about evading governments. XRP is a lot better than BTC for that.

62041050
>>62040054
m8 i dont give a crap if its real or not. It makes me easy money, if handle correctly

62041059
>>62041050
>>62040054
Im OP btw. Somehow my id change even though i use the same wifi

62041071
>>62039143
Overture, curtains, lights
This is it, tonight's the night

62041093
>>62039143
You retards really don't know what a black swan even is lmao
It has already came and went.
>>62039223
>The price went down in a completely different way at a completely different spot
>IT'S THE SAME PUTTURN GOIS!!
This guy can't even into TA

62041217
>>62041093
How do you define a low? Because we've broken below the low of March 9th.

62041609
>>62041217
That's not even a low. That's just random micro noise, pure chop.
Lows are defined as the low of an impulse move.

The move from feb 24th to march 16th is one move with one low.

There is for certain one low, ~60k. The second low is extremely debatable, and might not be a valid low. But, probably is because it creates a new high in the range.
But, without a shadow of a doubt, 66 and 67k are NOT lows.

62041745
>>62039143
>""Black Swan""
Yeah, that's not what's happening.
>Sell off was telegraphed a mile away with options expiring and MARA being desperate for cash
>Dumb fucks seriously thought 75k was a realistic max pain threshold in a bear market, they get what's coming to them
>Everyone already prepped with buy orders at 65k
>Recovery back to 71k expected by monday at the soonest if all continues as is and Trump stays on the golf course and out of the war room

62041768
>>62041609
they are lows compared to yesterday

62041794
>>62041745
I bought in at 68. How am I doing? Let's just say it would be the difference between 1.09 and 1.14 Bitcoin

62041922
>>62041768
That's a completely meaningless sentence. Lows are structural. Intraday lows are just noise.
Perspectives like yours are exactly why people don't believe in TA. Because they cannot accurately define what a low is. They'll see random choppy noise and call it lower lows, then the price will flip to the upside and break a high and they'll say TA is useless.


Calling every little bit of chop a low or a high is just retarded. If you cannot accurately define what highs and lows are, you're doomed to be chopped up and stopped out.

62041939
>>62039143
THIS IS IT
*bangs fingertip on table*
THIS IS IT

62041976
All you have to do is look at the weekly to see these are completely different patterns.

62041994
>>62041794
My opinion? Hold for now until shit stabalises. Set you next buy order at 67.2k if you want to be cautious and avoid buying blood. Next cycle will probably peak at 71k, maybe 72k if the market starts feeling bullish but there's no way we're going to see any massive bullruns anytime soon.

62042239
>>62039143
Sundump imminent.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 63 replies — 23.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-03-27 19:07 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026946
METROBOOMIN we fucking work on this bro we aint stopping until we stopping and we stoppin when want to stopp

62027041
>>62026933
alright listen I dont HEAR voices in my head, but I get FEELINGS and my FEELINGS are telling me you feel guilty because yes this thread made me do this impromptu extended ENDUUURANCE binge and. I wanna tell you dont fuckking feel guilty bro you are fine, listen listen to this if you wanna feel better because this is how I feel right now. I feel great: https://youtu.be/6-8E4Nirh9s

I'm gonna crash maybe 6-8 hours, I have to because there's a part of my mind that know it's not okay to be awake for 2.5 days straight. I think I slept on sunday right?

62027049
>>62027041
I slept on saturday?

62027058
>>62026933
THE FUCK I responded to this guy 1 min after and HE still HASNT RESPONDED, FED RIGHT. FUCKING knew it damnit. wait no im wrong please XuxTjBS9 if you're a federal AGENT just lmk.

FBI = Friendly Bean Inspector

62027062
theres something wrong with me man im sorry >>62026933

you soundcool and I remember everything I just, im not myself

62027078
>>62024567
you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?

62029411
>>62027062
statust report

did u take more?

62029441
>>62029411
i crashed man, i feel alright but man it's honestly funny looking at my posts here lol. I actually went nuts, im gonna chill out for a bit but my brain keeps telling me I should get back to work. the fucking meth use justifies it and it just feeds itself over and over.

honestly I was truly built to be self-employed but man I.... I really should take a break. I havent even properly caught up on my sleep. I appreciate you being patient with me though, I actually accused you of being a fed lmao.

62029444
>>62029411
>did u take more?
right to answer your question no, I went to my bed to "rest my eyes" and slept. like that weird amphetamine sleep where you feel awake and asleep at the same time and get rest at the same time, its so fucking weird.

62029447
>>62029411
i'd show you my stash but this is a blue board lmao. they're nice and clear.

62029634
>>62024567
I am about sick and tired of your bullshit Gordon.
Stop cooking and make the fucking third game you piece of shit.

62029643
>>62029634
I just checked, and not a single half life reference ITT before mine? all of /biz/ are fucking esptein jews sucking each others dicks.

fuck this board.

62029671
>>62027078
>you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?
Everyone on biz knows the worst thing to do with money is buy a house, no! Gamble it in the jewish casino and lose 60% like this homeless retard did.
Let the goyim deal in the real world.

62029686
Crush and rub it on your gums whats the worse that can happen

62033249
>>62024602
>>62024639
damn these doses are tiny compared to mine, is my gear just trash? I've gotten from 3 different plugs 100s of kms away from each other too, and all my gear passes the bleach test with flying colors (instantly moves all over the place on contact).

I've tried 20-50mg in a capsule, but it didn't start feeling good until like 60-80mg+
I don't even binge, I take one oral dose for a 12hr chemsex session, and then take a 2 week break, because I don't want to build any tolerance.
Last time I did 120mg in a single cap and only then did I feel it hit hard.

Pic related stash

62033277
>>62024666
Jesus christ what even is /biz/ about anymore kek

62033280
>>62024956
>>62033249
The only reason I keep increasing my dosage is because I'm looking for a high I experienced once and then never again

I used to only do ecstasy, but one time I think I got a meth bomb. It wasn't a gradual comeup to a lovey-dovey roll, it went from 0 to 100 with the most insane rush ever, nothing has ever felt that good in my life ever before and ever since.

I've since hunted for that feeling, no MDMA press or cap ever came close since. I've done 4mmc, meth, even combos like meth+molly+GHB, none of those even come close to 10% of how good that one press felt. And I take huge breaks to make sure it's not a tolerance issue (2 week breaks for meth and mephedrone, 2-3 month break for molly)

I've actually nearly given up on finding it and just enjoy these other drugs, which just don't really compare imo but what can I do. I just settle for these now since I found a girl who is willing to roll with me once every 2 weeks for a long ass chemsex session.

Also, this isn't a stim fueled essay, I'm sober lol, my last session was over a week ago, been sober since, next one coming up soon

62033290
>>62024567
>switzerland euthanasia pods
oh ok so its a jew writing this thread so that white people are reminded about being sold suicide

62033391
>>62024567
what's the bull case? like, why will the value of the coin go up? just because you hope so? this is probably one of the worst times in the history of crypto to invest in shitcoins based on what's happening economically right now.

62033492
>Down to 200k
I would legitimately be retired if I had that much money, my break-even is around 60k if I work for a month a year on odd jobs.
Kind of weird looking back and seeing that I could be retired now at 27 if I just stuck with my last job for 2 more years and invested it all.

62034164
>>62033492
how can u retire with 200k lmao

62034249
>>62034164
>>62034164
That's enough if I was alone.
The FIRE safe withdrawal rate is 4% (although my main non-crypto investment has been doing 6-8% annually since 2018).

4% of 200k is 8000, which is 666 usd per month.
Just retire to a 3rd world country.
I used to rent a tiny 20sqm studio here for like 100 usd per month, and I would eat at street food places like pic related for $1 to $1.50 per meal Ate twice a day, paid $20 monthly for internet, just played or watched series movies and anime on my phone all day.

And ice here is like $25 to $35 a gram.
I actually lived that lifestyle for like 3 years, it was okay.

62034517
>>62034164
>Live with family
>No car no buy
That simple, I basically have to scrape together a couple hundred a month and I'm good.
And yes I can do it forever and never get kicked out.
I picked 200,000 because the official number is 150k if we factor in an average stock market growth, but I wanted a little cushion. In reality I'm gonna be doing some part-time work on the side so I wouldn't even be touching said most time, I don't really consider picking fruit at my uncle's farm for a couple hours "work."

My monthly expenses are probably 600 dollars or less.
>>62034249
Yeah I could go overseas too but I just live with family and basically have this life already.
It's actually crazy how cheap living is when you don't have a car or house payment, like I only work now to stack up money for future-proofing stuff. The cost is similar to having 3 roommates in a low cost of living area.
